source_pr.title: br: fix some unstable unit test cases.
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Problem Summary:
Close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/30448
1. mock.start() failed due to conflict port. https://ci.pingcap.net/blue/organizations/jenkins/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/detail/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/24748/pipeline/
2. trace_serial_test failed due to schedule not stable in 10ms.

### What is changed and how it works?
1. add 10 times retry to get avaiable port.
2. change 10ms wait to 100ms
### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test


### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
None
```
